jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - NTPC - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
NTPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NTPC:
NTPC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NTPC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
